requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — INTECO Conformity and ICE / ARESEP Distributor Interconnection for Costa Rica
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——哥斯达黎加INTECO合格评定及ICE / ARESEP配电商并网
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——哥斯大黎加INTECO合格評定及ICE / ARESEP配電商併網

summary.en: INTECO (Instituto de Normas Técnicas de Costa Rica) is Costa Rica's national standards body and adopts IEC standards, including IEC 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters) as the applicable safety standards for PV inverters in the Costa Rica market. IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is the expected safety documentation for inverters submitted for interconnection review by ICE and the licensed distributors (CNFL, Coopeguanacaste, JASEC, ESPH) under ARESEP's generación distribuida para autoconsumo scheme. Because Costa Rica operates at 60 Hz / 120-240 V, safety test parameters including dielectric withstand, insulation, and protection relay operation should be assessed in the context of the relevant voltage ratings for the 120-240 V Americas grid rather than China's 220-380 V grid.
summary.zh: INTECO（哥斯达黎加国家技术标准研究所）是哥斯达黎加国家标准机构，采用IEC标准，包括IEC 62109-1（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆变器特殊要求），作为哥斯达黎加市场光伏逆变器适用安全标准。在ARESEP「分布式自用发电」方案下，ICE和持牌配电商（CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC、ESPH）对并网审查提交逆变器时，来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据是预期的安全文件。由于哥斯达黎加采用60 Hz / 120-240 V，介电耐压、绝缘和保护继电器动作等安全测试参数应在120-240 V美洲电网相关电压等级的背景下评估，而非中国220-380 V电网。
summary.zht: INTECO（哥斯大黎加國家技術標準研究所）是哥斯大黎加國家標準機構，採用IEC標準，包括IEC 62109-1（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆變器特殊要求），作為哥斯大黎加市場光伏逆變器適用安全標準。在ARESEP「分散式自用發電」方案下，ICE和持牌配電商（CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC、ESPH）對併網審查提交逆變器時，來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據是預期的安全文件。由於哥斯大黎加採用60 Hz / 120-240 V，介電耐壓、絕緣和保護繼電器動作等安全測試參數應在120-240 V美洲電網相關電壓等級的背景下評估，而非中國220-380 V電網。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (INTECO adoption, applicable to Costa Rica PV inverters)
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (parent standard, implicitly applicable)
INTECO — Instituto de Normas Técnicas de Costa Rica — national standards body; adopts IEC standards
ARESEP / ICE / CNFL / Coopeguanacaste / JASEC / ESPH — interconnection technical review requires IEC safety evidence

summary.en: China's primary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which covers classification, environmental conditions, safety, electrical performance, EMC, and markings. GB/T 37408 testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While GB/T 37408 shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2, it is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted by INTECO, ICE, or Costa Rica's licensed distributors as equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence. Additionally, GB/T 37408 is calibrated to China's 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid; voltage-related safety parameters (e.g., dielectric withstand levels, AC output voltage ratings) differ from those applicable to Costa Rica's 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全的主要标准为GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），涵盖分类、环境条件、安全、电气性能、EMC和标识。GB/T 37408测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管GB/T 37408与IEC 62109-1/-2在概念上具有相同的安全意图，但未与IEC 62109协调，不被INTECO、ICE或哥斯达黎加持牌配电商接受为IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据的等效依据。此外，GB/T 37408针对中国50 Hz / 220-380 V电网校准；电压相关安全参数（如介电耐压水平、交流输出电压额定值）与哥斯达黎加60 Hz / 120-240 V电网适用参数不同。
summary.zht: 中國光伏並網逆變器安全的主要標準為GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），涵蓋分類、環境條件、安全、電氣性能、EMC和標識。GB/T 37408測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管GB/T 37408與IEC 62109-1/-2在概念上具有相同的安全意圖，但未與IEC 62109協調，不被INTECO、ICE或哥斯大黎加持牌配電商接受為IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據的等效依據。此外，GB/T 37408針對中國50 Hz / 220-380 V電網校準；電壓相關安全參數（如介電耐壓水平、交流輸出電壓額定值）與哥斯大黎加60 Hz / 120-240 V電網適用參數不同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters — China domestic, 50 Hz-based)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy INTECO/IEC 62109-1/-2 requirements for Costa Rica. Exporters must obtain IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family being supplied to the Costa Rica project. The test report scope should confirm coverage of the 60 Hz / 120-240 V Americas grid voltage parameters relevant to Costa Rica. Existing Chinese safety certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 must be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports before submitting equipment documentation for ICE or distributor interconnection review under ARESEP's generación distribuida scheme.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408安全认证不满足哥斯达黎加INTECO/IEC 62109-1/-2要求。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖供应至哥斯达黎加项目特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证书。测试报告范围应确认涵盖与哥斯达黎加相关的60 Hz / 120-240 V美洲电网电压参数。仅依据GB/T 37408的现有中国安全证书，在向ICE或配电商提交ARESEP「分布式自用发电」方案下并网审查设备文件前，须补充IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足哥斯大黎加INTECO/IEC 62109-1/-2要求。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋供應至哥斯大黎加項目特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證書。測試報告範圍應確認涵蓋與哥斯大黎加相關的60 Hz / 120-240 V美洲電網電壓參數。僅依據GB/T 37408的現有中國安全證書，在向ICE或配電商提交ARESEP「分散式自用發電」方案下併網審查設備文件前，須補充IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for ICE and distributor interconnection review under ARESEP generación distribuida para autoconsumo; INTECO adoption of IEC 62109-1/-2 makes these the applicable Costa Rica safety standards for PV inverters
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2019 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law; does not substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 in Costa Rica

source.publisher: INTECO (Instituto de Normas Técnicas de Costa Rica)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy the IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence expected for Costa Rica INTECO conformity and ICE/distributor interconnection review. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory, confirming that the test scope covers the 60 Hz / 120-240 V voltage ratings applicable to Costa Rica's Americas-standard grid. Verify current INTECO standard adoption status and distributor interconnection documentation requirements directly with INTECO (inteco.org) and the relevant distributor (ICE at grupoice.com, or CNFL, Coopeguanacaste, JASEC, or ESPH) before committing to a test programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足哥斯达黎加INTECO合格评定及ICE/配电商并网审查预期的IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据要求。请安排ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验，确认测试范围涵盖哥斯达黎加美洲标准电网适用的60 Hz / 120-240 V电压额定值。在启动测试计划前，请直接向INTECO（inteco.org）及相关配电商（ICE：grupoice.com，或CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH）核实当前INTECO标准采纳状态和配电商并网文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足哥斯大黎加INTECO合格評定及ICE/配電商併網審查預期的IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據要求。請安排ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗，確認測試範圍涵蓋哥斯大黎加美洲標準電網適用的60 Hz / 120-240 V電壓額定值。在啟動測試計畫前，請直接向INTECO（inteco.org）及相關配電商（ICE：grupoice.com，或CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH）核實當前INTECO標準採納狀態和配電商併網文件要求。
